title: Charlotte Woman Arrested in Grocery Store Stabbing
summary: A woman with a criminal history was arrested for stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot after a two-week search.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of violent crime and the vulnerability of pregnant women in public spaces.

title: Repeat Offender Accused in Harris Teeter Stabbing
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte Harris Teeter parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about repeat offenders and the effectiveness of the justice system in preventing violent crime.

title: Braylon Clark Details Visit with Tennessee Football
summary: 2028 North Carolina wide receiver Braylon Clark from Charlotte Country Day School visits Knoxville for a football recruitment opportunity.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local athletic talent and the recruitment process for young athletes in the region.

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
summary: Guidance on selecting a deck builder in Charlotte to enhance living space, outdoor enjoyment, and property value through successful home improvement projects.
charlotte_impact: Provides practical advice for homeowners looking to invest in their property and improve their quality of life.

title: Students Design Brand for Brown Museum
summary: Students in Guilford County, NC, design a brand for Charlotte Hawkins Brown's Canary Cottage, which is celebrating its 100th anniversary.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the intersection of education, history, and community engagement in preserving local landmarks.

title: FG Nexus CEO to Speak at FII Priority Miami 2026
summary: FG Nexus CEO Maja Vujinovic will co-chair the digital assets conclave and speak on a stablecoins panel at FII Priority Miami 2026.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's presence in the digital asset and financial technology sectors on a global stage.

title: Fatal Stabbing in Cornelius, Suspect Arrested
summary: One person is dead after a stabbing incident in Cornelius, NC. The incident occurred on Ruffner Drive, and a suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the issue of violent crime in the Cornelius area and the immediate response by law enforcement.

title: Black Maternal Health Week Highlights Pregnancy Outcome Gaps
summary: Black Maternal Health Week focuses on disparities impacting Black mothers in North Carolina and across the country, aiming to improve outcomes.
charlotte_impact: Draws attention to critical health disparities and efforts to improve maternal health outcomes for Black women.

title: Priest's Confession Questions Under Scrutiny
summary: Parents raise concerns about a Charlotte Catholic High School priest's questions during confession; the Diocese found no misconduct.
charlotte_impact: Addresses issues of privacy, ethical boundaries, and religious practices within the Catholic community.

title: Charlotte Leaders Launch Safety Plan Amid High Crash Numbers
summary: Charlotte leaders are developing a safety plan with over $3 million in funding to reduce crashes and save lives in the region.
charlotte_impact: Highlights efforts to improve road safety and reduce traffic-related fatalities and injuries in Charlotte.

title: CMS Bus Involved in Rowan County Crash
summary: A Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools (CMS) bus on a field trip was involved in a crash on NC Highway 150 near Scottish Drive in Rowan County.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about student safety during school-related transportation and the potential risks involved.

title: Charlotte Groups Tackle Hygiene Poverty Among Students
summary: Charlotte groups are addressing hygiene poverty among students by providing access to laundry facilities to improve school attendance and confidence.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a critical barrier to education and highlights community efforts to support student well-being.

title: Man Killed by Train in Southeast Charlotte
summary: A man was hit and killed by a train at a crossing near Sardis Road North and Galleria Boulevard in southeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of train crossings and the need for safety measures to prevent pedestrian fatalities.

title: NC Lawmakers Advance Property Tax Cap Measure
summary: North Carolina lawmakers are advancing a measure to cap local property tax increases, which must pass both the House and Senate before voter consideration.
charlotte_impact: Addresses potential changes to property tax regulations and their impact on homeowners and local government finances.

title: Car Overturns on I-77 in Huntersville, 1 Injured
summary: A car overturned on I-77 in Huntersville near the Gilead Road exit, resulting in one person being injured and the toll lanes being closed.
charlotte_impact: Highlights traffic safety issues on I-77 and the potential for accidents to cause injuries and disrupt traffic flow.
